nasb.text: And behold, a severe earthquake had occurred, for an angel of the Lord descended from heaven and came and rolled away the stone and sat upon it.

esv.text: And behold, there was a great earthquake, for an angel of the Lord descended from heaven and came and rolled back the stone and sat on it.

cnv.text: 忽然，地震得很厲害；主的使者從天上下來，把石頭輥開，坐在上面。

ccb.text: 突然，大地剧烈地震动，上帝的天使从天而降，推开堵着墓穴的石头，坐在上面。

csbs.text: 忽然发生了强烈的地震，主的一位天使从天上降下来，上前把那石头滚开，坐在上面。
